name: Thai Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons peanut butter, smooth or chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the oil and 4 ingredients (peanut butter, soy sauce, cider vinegar, and crushed red pepper).
2. Add water to taste and whisk again.
3. Stir in the chopped green onions.
4. Add the chicken pieces and toss until well coated with the dressing.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
6. The salad can be served warm or chilled.
7. For garnish, add radish roses, sprouts, cucumber slices, and chopped peanuts if desired.
